channel.title: 3omdaughh's Room
channel.description: Raw logs from 3omda: tech, security, and whatever's on my mind.

item.title: Day in Emergency Department
item.description: A week orbiting hospitals, and what the emergency department peels back about how casually we treat what we'd beg to keep.

item.title: Oh How We Fell
item.description: No update, no lesson, no redemption arc. Just thoughts spilling because keeping them contained started to cost more than letting them out.

item.title: Storm's Over, Scars Stay
item.description: After the storm passes, what stays.

item.title: I've had enough
item.description: Enough of burnout, of failure, of the mind that never shuts up.

item.title: WHYs & WHAT IFs
item.description: The questions that loop at night.

item.title: Am I enough.! Am I?
item.description: The question that's been stuck since childhood: always playing catch-up, always the underdog.

item.title: Blog-Announcement!
item.description: Hello-World! Pure HTML/CSS, under 10kb, a C program that writes the posts. How this site got built.
